---
title: "BPMEraAdjust_V2"
author: "Ethan Mathew"
date: "2026-03-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
install.packages("VGAM")
library(VGAM)
```

## Cleaning and Reading Files

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(fullhouse)

# ---------------------------------------------------
# LOAD DATA
# ---------------------------------------------------

talent_pool <- read.csv("talent_pool_estimation/talent_pool.csv") %>%
  mutate(talent_pool = talent_adj * 1000000) %>%
  rename(season = year)

df <- read.csv(
  "basketball_reference_scraper/data/nba_advanced_1950_2025.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# ---------------------------------------------------
# CLEAN DATA
# ---------------------------------------------------

df_clean <- df %>%
  filter(ranker != "Rk") %>%
  filter(!grepl("League", name_display)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(name_display),
         name_display != "",
         name_display != "Player") %>%
  filter(!is.na(team_name_abbr),
         team_name_abbr != "",
         team_name_abbr != "Team") %>%
  mutate(
    age   = as.numeric(age),
    games = as.numeric(games),
    mp    = as.numeric(mp),
    bpm   = as.numeric(bpm)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(bpm), mp >= 500, games >= 30)

# ---------------------------------------------------
# HANDLE MULTI TEAM SEASONS (TOT ROWS)
# ---------------------------------------------------

df_clean <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(name_display, season) %>%
  mutate(has_tot = any(team_name_abbr == "TOT")) %>%
  filter(!(has_tot & team_name_abbr != "TOT")) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  select(-has_tot) %>%
  ungroup()

df_bpm <- df_clean %>%
  left_join(talent_pool, by = "season")

df_bpm <- df_bpm %>% 
  select("name_display", "bpm", "talent_pool", "per", "season", "mp")
```

## Final DataFrame Head

```{r}
head(df_clean)
# df_bpm <- df_bpm %>%
#   filter(season == "1999")

```

## Reference Era Computations

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
REF_YEARS <- 1985:2018

ref_df <- df_bpm %>%
  filter(season %in% REF_YEARS)

ref_y <- sort(ref_df$bpm)

ref_npop <- mean(ref_df$talent_pool, na.rm = TRUE)

ref_k <- k_finder(ref_y)

ref_ystarstar <- compute_ystarstar(ref_y, ref_k)$ystarstar

ref_talents <- talent_computing_nonpara(
  ystarstar = ref_ystarstar,
  y         = ref_y,
  npop      = ref_npop
)

ref_n <- length(ref_y)

ref_ystar <- ref_y[2] - ref_y[1]

ref_ytilde <- numeric(ref_n + 1)

ref_ytilde[1] <- ref_y[1] - ref_ystar

ref_ytilde[2:ref_n] <- (ref_y[2:ref_n] + ref_y[1:(ref_n-1)]) / 2

ref_ytilde[ref_n + 1] <- ref_y[ref_n] + ref_ystarstar
```

## Computing Talent Scores

```{r}
season_talents <- df_bpm %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  group_modify(function(data, key){

    npop <- data$talent_pool[1]
    fail_stage <- NA

    y <- sort(data$bpm)

    if(length(y) < 6 || is.na(npop)){
      fail_stage <- "data_insufficient"
      data$talent_score <- NA
      data$fail_stage <- fail_stage
      return(data)
    }

    k <- tryCatch(k_finder(y), error=function(e) NULL)

    if(is.null(k)){
      fail_stage <- "k_finder"
      data$talent_score <- NA
      data$fail_stage <- fail_stage
      return(data)
    }

    yss <- tryCatch(compute_ystarstar(y,k)$ystarstar,
                    error=function(e) NULL)

    if(is.null(yss)){
      fail_stage <- "ystarstar"
      data$talent_score <- NA
      data$fail_stage <- fail_stage
      return(data)
    }

    talents <- tryCatch(
      talent_computing_nonpara(
        ystarstar = yss,
        y = y,
        npop = npop
      ),
      error=function(e) NULL
    )

    if(is.null(talents)){
      fail_stage <- "talent_compute"
      data$talent_score <- NA
      data$fail_stage <- fail_stage
      return(data)
    }

    data_sorted <- data %>% arrange(bpm)
    data_sorted$talent_score <- talents
    data_sorted$fail_stage <- "success"

    return(data_sorted)
  }) %>%
  ungroup()
```

## Computing Era Adjusted Score

```{r}
# THIS CAN BE ADJUSTED
season_talents <- season_talents %>%
  mutate(
    bpm_era_adj = approx(
      x = ref_talents,
      y = ref_y,
      xout = talent_score,
      rule = 2
    )$y
  )


season_talents %>%
  filter(!is.na(bpm_era_adj)) %>%
  arrange(desc(bpm_era_adj)) %>%
  select(name_display, season, bpm, talent_score, bpm_era_adj)
```

## K-Value and Y\*\* Investigation

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_tail_model_true <- function(season){
  data <- df_bpm %>% filter(season == !!season)
  y <- sort(data$bpm)
  npop <- data$talent_pool[1]
  
  if(length(y) < 6 || is.na(npop)){
    print("Insufficient data")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  k   <- k_finder(y)
  res <- compute_ystarstar(y, k)
  k   <- as.numeric(k$k[1])
  
  print(paste("k =", k, "| n =", length(y)))
  
  # extract from res
  yss   <- as.numeric(res$ystarstar)[1]
  model <- res$model
  Y     <- res$Y
  W     <- res$W
  
  # tail points pulled directly from model to guarantee alignment with red line
  x_tail <- model$model[, 2]
  y_tail <- model$model[, 1]
  
  # detect transformation from model formula
  f        <- deparse(formula(model))
  uses_log <- grepl("log(tail(W", f, fixed = TRUE)
  
  # reconstruct x for non-tail using same transformation
  n_full <- length(y)
  j_all  <- 1:n_full
  p_all  <- (j_all - 1/3) / (n_full + 1/3)
  W_all  <- p_all / (1 - p_all)   # odds = W
  
  if(uses_log){
    W_all <- log(W_all)
  }
  
  x_nontail <- head(W_all, n_full - k)
  y_nontail <- head(y, n_full - k)
  
  # plot
  plot(
    x_nontail, y_nontail,
    pch  = 19,
    col  = "black",
    xlim = range(c(x_nontail, x_tail)),
    ylim = range(y),
    main = paste("Season", season),
    xlab = ifelse(uses_log, "log(W)", "W"),
    ylab = "BPM"
  )
  
  points(x_tail, y_tail, pch = 19, col = "blue")
  abline(model, col = "red", lwd = 2)
}

plot_tail_model_true(2000)
```

## Reproduction of Technical Primer

```{r}
bpm_generations <- df_bpm %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  lapply(function(x) arrange(x, desc(bpm))) %>%
  setNames(sort(unique(df_bpm$season)))
bpm_generations[[1]]
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(parallel)
library(fullhouse)

nCores = detectCores() - 2

cl <- makeCluster(nCores)
system.time({
  kmat = do.call(rbind, mclapply(seq_along(bpm_generations), 
    FUN = function(j) {
      k_finder(x = bpm_generations[[j]] %>% pull(bpm))  
    }, mc.cores = nCores))
})
stopCluster(cl)

```

```{r}
kmat
```

```{r}
new_compute_ystarstar <- function(x, k_info, method = "robust", stab = 0.01, cutoff = 0.014) {
  stopifnot(method %in% c("robust", "legacy"))
  Y = sort(as.matrix(x))
  n = length(Y)
  Y[n] = Y[n] + stab
  pi = 1 - (n:1 - 1/3)/(n + 1/3)
  W = log(pi/(1 - pi))
  ystarstar = 10
  ub = 0.999
  k = k_info$k
  k_selector_I0 = k_info$k_selector_I0
  a = k_info$a
  b = k_info$b
  ind = k_info$ind
  if (method == "robust") {
    
    # Helper: choose search interval based on whether max point is below or above the curve
    get_search_interval = function(model, W, Y) {
      at_max_W = predict(model, newdata = data.frame(W = max(W)))
      if (max(Y) > at_max_W) {
        # max point is above curve — crossing is far out in tail
        return(c(mean(c(tail(W, 2)[1], max(W))), max(W) + 2))
      } else {
        # max point is below curve — crossing is earlier, before max(W)
        return(c(0, max(W)))
      }
    }
    
    models = list(m1 = lm(tail(Y, k) ~ tail(W, k)), m2 = lm(tail(Y, 
                                                                 k) ~ tail(W, k) + I(tail(W, k)^2)))
    models = models[names(sort(sapply(models, BIC)))]
    selected_model = models[[1]]
    f = function(w) {
      max(Y) - predict(selected_model, newdata = data.frame(W = w))
    }
    flag = try({
      ub_w = uniroot(f, get_search_interval(selected_model, W, Y), 
                     tol = 1e-10)$root
      ub = 1/(1 + exp(-ub_w))
    }, silent = TRUE)
    if (class(flag) != "try-error") {
      try({
        g = function(ystarstar) ub - Ftilde(y = Y, t = max(Y), 
                                            ystarstar = ystarstar)
        bar = uniroot(g, c(0, 100), tol = 1e-10)
        ystarstar = bar$root
      }, silent = TRUE)
    }
    if (ystarstar == 10) {
      selected_model = models[[2]]
      f = function(w) {
        max(Y) - predict(selected_model, newdata = data.frame(W = w))
      }
      flag = try({
        ub_w = uniroot(f, get_search_interval(selected_model, W, Y), 
                       tol = 1e-10)$root
        ub = 1/(1 + exp(-ub_w))
      }, silent = TRUE)
      if (class(flag) != "try-error") {
        try({
          g = function(ystarstar) ub - Ftilde(y = Y, 
                                              t = max(Y), ystarstar = ystarstar)
          bar = uniroot(g, c(0, 100), tol = 1e-10)
          ystarstar = bar$root
        }, silent = TRUE)
      }
    }
    models = list(m1 = lm(tail(Y, k) ~ log(tail(W, k))), 
                  m2 = lm(tail(Y, k) ~ log(tail(W, k)) + I(log(tail(W, 
                                                                    k))^2)))
    if (any(BIC(selected_model) > sapply(models, BIC))) {
      models = models[names(sort(sapply(models, BIC)))]
      selected_model = models[[1]]
      f = function(w) {
        max(Y) - predict(selected_model, newdata = data.frame(W = w))
      }
      flag = try({
        ub_w = uniroot(f, get_search_interval(selected_model, W, Y), 
                       tol = 1e-10)$root
        ub = 1/(1 + exp(-ub_w))
      }, silent = TRUE)
      if (class(flag) != "try-error") {
        try({
          g = function(ystarstar) ub - Ftilde(y = Y, 
                                              t = max(Y), ystarstar = ystarstar)
          bar = uniroot(g, c(0, 100), tol = 1e-10)
          ystarstar = bar$root
        }, silent = TRUE)
      }
      if (ystarstar == 10) {
        selected_model = models[[2]]
        f = function(w) {
          max(Y) - predict(selected_model, newdata = data.frame(W = w))
        }
        flag = try({
          ub_w = uniroot(f, get_search_interval(selected_model, W, Y), 
                         tol = 1e-10)$root
          ub = 1/(1 + exp(-ub_w))
        }, silent = TRUE)
        if (class(flag) != "try-error") {
          try({
            g = function(ystarstar) ub - Ftilde(y = Y, 
                                                t = max(Y), ystarstar = ystarstar)
            bar = uniroot(g, c(0, 100), tol = 1e-10)
            ystarstar = bar$root
          }, silent = TRUE)
        }
      }
    }
    if (ystarstar == 10) {
      selected_model = lm(tail(Y, k) ~ tail(W, k) + I(tail(W, 
                                                           k)^2) + I(tail(W, k)^3))
      f = function(w) {
        max(Y) - predict(selected_model, newdata = data.frame(W = w))
      }
      flag = try({
        ub_w = uniroot(f, get_search_interval(selected_model, W, Y), 
                       tol = 1e-10)$root
        ub = 1/(1 + exp(-ub_w))
      }, silent = TRUE)
      if (class(flag) != "try-error") {
        try({
          g = function(ystarstar) ub - Ftilde(y = Y, 
                                              t = max(Y), ystarstar = ystarstar)
          bar = uniroot(g, c(0, 100), tol = 1e-10)
          ystarstar = bar$root
        }, silent = TRUE)
      }
    }
  }
  out = list(ystarstar = ystarstar, model = selected_model, 
             Y = tail(Y, k), pi = tail(pi, k), W = tail(W, k))
  return(out)
}
```

```{r}
system.time({
  out = mclapply(seq_along(bpm_generations), 
    FUN = function(j) { 
      new_compute_ystarstar(x = bpm_generations[[j]] %>% pull(bpm), 
                        k = kmat[j, 1])
      }, 
    mc.cores = nCores)
})
```

```{r}
ystar_mat = do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(bpm_generations), 
  function(j) out[[j]]$ystar )
)
```

```{r}
ystar_mat
```

```{r}
par(mfrow = c(2,3))            
for(j in 1:6){
  plot(out[[j]]$W, out[[j]]$Y, main = paste("Year ", 1973 + j), 
       xlab = "function of tail probabilities", ylab = "bpm")
  lines(out[[j]]$W, predict(out[[j]]$model))  
}
par(mfrow = c(2,3))
for(j in 7:12){
  plot(out[[j]]$W, out[[j]]$Y, main = paste("Year ", 1973 + j), 
       xlab = "function of tail probabilities", ylab = "bpm")
  lines(out[[j]]$W, predict(out[[j]]$model))  
}
par(mfrow = c(2,3))
for(j in 13:18){
  plot(out[[j]]$W, out[[j]]$Y, main = paste("Year ", 1973 + j), 
       xlab = "function of tail probabilities", ylab = "bpm")
  lines(out[[j]]$W, predict(out[[j]]$model))  
}


par(mfrow = c(2,3))
for(j in 19:24){
  plot(out[[j]]$W, out[[j]]$Y, main = paste("Year ", 1973 + j), 
       xlab = "function of tail probabilities", ylab = "bpm")
  lines(out[[j]]$W, predict(out[[j]]$model))  
}

par(mfrow = c(2,3))
for(j in 25:30){
  plot(out[[j]]$W, out[[j]]$Y, main = paste("Year ", 1973 + j), 
       xlab = "function of tail probabilities", ylab = "bpm")
  lines(out[[j]]$W, predict(out[[j]]$model))  
}

par(mfrow = c(2,3))
for(j in 31:36){
  plot(out[[j]]$W, out[[j]]$Y, main = paste("Year ", 1973 + j), 
       xlab = "function of tail probabilities", ylab = "bpm")
  lines(out[[j]]$W, predict(out[[j]]$model))  
}
par(mfrow = c(2,3))
for(j in 37:42){
  plot(out[[j]]$W, out[[j]]$Y, main = paste("Year ", 1973 + j), 
       xlab = "function of tail probabilities", ylab = "bpm")
  lines(out[[j]]$W, predict(out[[j]]$model))  
}
par(mfrow = c(2,3))
for(j in 43:48){
  plot(out[[j]]$W, out[[j]]$Y, main = paste("Year ", 1973 + j), 
       xlab = "function of tail probabilities", ylab = "bpm")
  lines(out[[j]]$W, predict(out[[j]]$model))  
}
```

```{r}
system.time({
  bpm_adjust_vs_peers = 
    do.call(rbind, 
          mclapply(seq_along(bpm_generations), 
                   mc.cores = nCores, function(j){
                     cbind(bpm_generations[[j]], 
                           "bpm_talent" = 
                       talent_computing_nonpara(ystar = as.numeric(ystar_mat[j, 1]), 
                                              y = bpm_generations[[j]] %>% pull(bpm), 
                                              npop = bpm_generations[[j]]$talent_pool[j]))
                     })) %>% arrange(desc(bpm_talent))
})
```

```{r}
bpm_adjust_vs_peers
```

```{r}
foo = data.frame(diff = sapply(bpm_generations, function(x){
  -head(x %>% pull(bpm) %>% diff(), 1)}),
  n = sapply(bpm_generations, nrow), 
  yss = ystar_mat) %>% 
  mutate(balance = (diff/2)/((diff/2) + yss),
         U_beta = 1 - 1/n + 1/n * (diff/2)/((diff/2) + yss),
         p_beta = pbeta(U_beta, n, 1), 
         group = seq_along(bpm_generations))
foo
```

## Era Adjusting Careers

```{r}
df_clean <- bpm_adjust_vs_peers %>%
  filter(season <= 2023, !is.na(bpm_talent), !is.na(bpm), !is.na(mp))

ref_season <- 2000:2010

ref_dist <- df_clean %>%
  filter(season %in% ref_season) %>%
  arrange(bpm_talent) %>%
  mutate(ref_percentile = row_number() / n())

map_to_ref <- function(talent_score, ref_dist) {
  idx <- which.min(abs(ref_dist$bpm_talent - talent_score))
  return(ref_dist$bpm[idx])
}

df_mapped <- df_clean %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(bpm = map_to_ref(bpm_talent, ref_dist)) %>%
  ungroup()

career_bpm <- df_mapped %>%
  group_by(name_display) %>%
  summarise(
    total_mp = sum(mp),
    career_bpm = sum(bpm * mp) / total_mp
  ) %>%
  filter(total_mp > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(career_bpm))

head(career_bpm, 10000)
```

```{r}
df_mapped
```
